custom_u1lx49uo.title: Leap Year
custom_u1lx49uo.description:
Given an integer year, determine whether it is a leap year or not.

A year is considered a leap year if:

  • It is divisible by 400, OR
  • It is divisible by 4 but not divisible by 100.

Return true if the given year is a leap year; otherwise, return false.

Input

An integer year.

Output

Return true if the year is a leap year, otherwise return false.

Examples

Input: year = 2024
Output: true
Explanation: 2024 is divisible by 4 and not divisible by 100.

Input: year = 1900
Output: false
Explanation: 1900 is divisible by 100 but not by 400.

Input: year = 2000
Output: true
Explanation: 2000 is divisible by 400.

Constraints

  • 1 ≤ year ≤ 10000
